tools.name: search_clinical_trials
tools.description: Search ClinicalTrials.gov for studies that match a condition, intervention, sponsor, or phase.

intervention.description: Optional intervention, modality, or drug name.

max_results.description: Maximum number of records to return.

tools.name: get_clinical_trial_record
tools.description: Retrieve structured details for a ClinicalTrials.gov study by NCT ID.

tools.name: compare_clinical_trial_records
tools.description: Compare multiple ClinicalTrials.gov records and summarize common differences.

nct_ids.description: List of NCT identifiers to compare.
